positive: A mesmerizing celestial map composition featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with swirling galactic nebulae. The central subject is a majestic, geometric representation of a crescent moon partially obscuring a ringed planet, surrounded by constellations drawn in delicate glowing lines. Use a vaporwave/synthwave aesthetic with high contrast, deep indigo and vibrant teal accents against a matte black background. The artwork must maintain clean, graphic silhouettes, perfect for screen printing or apparel transfer. Minimalist composition, highly detailed yet easily scalable, central focus, vibrant glow effects, stylized symmetry, vector art style.
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, blur, grainy, artifact, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photo, realism, photorealism, low contrast, messy, ugly
